turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I got the job!!! The one I've been interviewing for three months. I start in two weeks. I'm literally shaking right now.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: That's incredible! Three months of effort paying off—you should feel so proud. Tell me about the role!

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: It's a senior product manager role at a Series B startup. 30% pay raise and I'll finally be working on something I actually care about.

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: I got the job!!! The one I've been interviewing for three months. I start in two weeks. I'm literally shaking right now.

scores.rationale: Explicit joy and excitement ('literally shaking'); high energy positive affect.
Emotion is driving the entire turn.
Success reinforces self-efficacy in this moment.
